name: Kolar Chevrolet Buick GMC Cadillac
notes: CMS: DealerOn (x-dealeron headers, cdn.dlron.us assets). RSS feed (/rss-usedinventory.aspx) has 25 items, no price. Sitemap had 177 used vehicle URLs; 169 unique VINs extracted via parallel HTML scraping of listing pages. Data extracted from sdDataLayer.vehicleDetails JS object (year/make/model/trim/drivetrain/price) and DOM mileage element. 8 listings returned no sdDataLayer (likely sold/expired during scrape).
